preheader_text: The Interaction Deep Dive in CQA: audit scores, verify AI decisions, and prep for coaching conversations.
headline: Meet the Interaction Deep Dive
subheadline: Audit scores, verify AI decisions, and prep coaching — all from one screen.
hero_image_alt: Interaction Deep Dive preview showing a call recording and scorecard
intro_html: You already use the Analysis List in CQA to track your team's call quality. The real power is in the Interaction Deep Dive — the detail view behind every scored call.
section_heading: Five things you can do right now
step_1_description: Play the full call directly in the platform — no downloads — and hear exactly what happened.
step_2_description: Review the complete conversation in text and follow along with what was discussed.
step_3_description: See scores broken down by category and sub-category; expand any section to verify KPI results.
step_4_description: Click any KPI to see the evidence and logic behind its pass/fail call — key for resolving disputes.
step_5_description: Compare the transcript and AI reasoning side-by-side to accept or reject with confidence.
callout_html: Training available now — watch the CQA navigation walkthrough on your HSL LMS platform.
footer_disclaimer: You're receiving this because you're a supervisor on CQA. Manage your notification preferences in account settings.
company_address: Exotel, Inc. · 548 Market St, San Francisco, CA 94104
